channel.title: emacs on Hugo
channel.description: Recent content in emacs on Hugo

item.title: using package.el with straight.el
item.description: i was using straight.el for all my package management until i had enough of having bugs in org mode because straight.el fetches the most recent versions of packages so i decided to use the builtin package.el package manager with the use-package macro as the default package management solution and straight.el for packages that arent available for straight.el, e.g. github packages straight.el snippet ;; setup straight.el package manager (defvar bootstrap-version) (let ((bootstrap-file (expand-file-name "straight/repos/straight.
